name: Coalition Cyber Insurance API
what_it_does: Coalition cyber insurance REST API for insurance brokers, MGAs, and enterprise risk platforms to automate cyber insurance quoting, binding, and cyber risk assessment through Coalition's technology-first cyber MGA that combines active cyber protection tools (attack surface monitoring, threat intelligence) with insurance coverage, enabling digital insurance distribution and cyber risk quantification. Enables AI agents to manage cyber insurance quote generation for broker automation, handle policy binding for digital cyber insurance automation, access cyber risk assessment for underwriting decision automation, retrieve attack surface monitoring for insured risk visibility automation, manage claims initiation for cyber incident response automation, handle premium calculation for cyber risk pricing automation, access policy document generation for insurance documentation automation, retrieve threat intelligence for risk exposure automation, manage mid-term endorsement for policy change automation, and integrate Coalition with insurance broker, MGA, and risk management platforms for end-to-end cyber insurance distribution automation.
use_cases: Generating cyber insurance quotes for broker platform automation agents
Binding digital cyber policies for insurtech distribution automation agents
Accessing cyber risk assessment for enterprise risk scoring automation agents
Monitoring attack surface for insured risk management automation agents
not_for: Property and casualty insurance beyond cyber (Coalition is cyber-focused MGA)
Consumer personal cyber insurance (Coalition is SMB and enterprise focused)
Direct consumer purchase without broker (Coalition primarily distributes via broker channel)
best_when: An insurance broker, MGA, or enterprise risk platform wanting AI agents to automate cyber insurance quoting, binding, and active risk monitoring through Coalition's technology-first cyber insurance platform with integrated attack surface visibility.
avoid_when: BROKER LICENSE REQUIRED FOR API ACCESS: Coalition API for quoting and binding requires licensed insurance broker or MGA credentials; automated access without insurance license creates unauthorized_broker error; automated direct binding without license creates regulatory violation. CYBER RISK ASSESSMENT IS DOMAIN-SCAN BASED: Coalition risk assessment scans insured's domain and IP ranges; automated quote must provide accurate domain for assessment; automated inaccurate domain scan creates wrong risk score and incorrect premium. ACTIVE PROTECTION ENROLLMENT IS SEPARATE: Coalition's active protection tools (attack surface monitoring) require separate enrollment; automated risk monitoring integration requires separate activation; automated assuming monitoring included without enrollment creates no monitoring data. QUOTE EXPIRY: Coalition quote is valid for limited period; automated binding must occur within quote validity; automated binding after expiry creates expired_quote requiring new risk assessment.

auth.notes: Coalition uses OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2017 by Joshua Motta. Backed by Valor Equity Partners, T. Rowe Price ($700M+ raised, $5B valuation). Products: Cyber insurance (SMB to enterprise), active protection, breach response, claims management. No public SDK. Admitted in all US states + Canada. Lloyd's syndicate. US, UK, Canada. Largest cyber MGA by premium. Competes with At-Bay and Corvus for digital cyber insurance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — broker partnership required
pricing.paid_tiers: Insurance premium based on risk assessment; API access for licensed brokers included; no direct API fee
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Valor/T. Rowe Price backed. Premium-based. Broker distribution model. Lloyd's + admitted.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; quote and bind APIs throttled; webhooks for policy and claim events

known_agent_gotchas: LICENSED BROKER OAUTH CREDENTIALS REQUIRED: Coalition API requires OAuth credentials issued to licensed insurance broker; automated access without broker license creates unauthorized_principal; automated developer credentials for quoting/binding creates regulatory compliance issue

DOMAIN SCAN ACCURACY IS CRITICAL FOR PRICING: Coalition cyber risk assessment scans applicant's domain; automated quote must provide accurate primary domain; automated wrong domain creates incorrect risk score and premium that may be invalid on claims

QUOTE-TO-BIND FLOW IS SEQUENTIAL: Coalition binding requires prior quote ID from quote step; automated binding must use quoteId from quote response; automated binding without valid quoteId creates invalid_quote reference

ACTIVE PROTECTION REQUIRES SEPARATE ENROLLMENT: Coalition's scanning and monitoring tools require separate enrollment flow; automated risk monitoring setup requires distinct activation step; automated monitoring data access without enrollment creates no monitoring data available

CLAIMS FIRST NOTICE TRIGGERS SLA: Coalition claims first notice starts SLA clock for breach response; automated claims initiation must include complete incident information; automated incomplete first notice creates SLA start without sufficient context for response team
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cyber insurance. SOC2, insurance regulation. OAuth2. US/CA/UK. Cyber risk and policy data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cyber insurance. SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA/UK. Cyber risk and insurance data.
